---
title: "Figure S3 — ST39 *K. pneumoniae* Multi-Panel with Plasmid Coverage"
author: "Ebenezer Foster-Nyarko"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 18
    fig-height: 10
  pdf:
    toc: true
    fig-width: 18
    fig-height: 10
    papersize: a4
---

<!--
Paper: Foster-Nyarko E et al. medRxiv (2026). https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.03.03.26347025.

Five-panel figure (A–E) aligned with the IQ-TREE2 ST39 phylogenetic tree:
  A: Phylogenetic tree with transmission cluster annotations
  B: AMR gene heatmap (drug classes coloured)
  C: Clinical/environmental metadata
  D: pNS39_A plasmid coverage (BWA-MEM alignment)
  E: Temporal distribution (month and week of collection)

Panels A–D are identical to Figure 5 but with the addition of Panel D (plasmid
coverage) and optimised for A4 printing (larger font sizes).

Data required (place in ../data/):
  - FileS1_to_FileS10.xlsx              : sheet "Supp_File2_Study_isolates"
  - clusters_data_final.csv             : transmission cluster assignments
  - st39_cluster.treefile               : IQ-TREE2 Newick tree
  - pNS39_A_alignment_coverage_summary.tsv : per-sample pNS39_A coverage
    (columns: Sample_ID, Ref_Coverage_%, Identity_%)
    Generated by: bwa mem pNS39_A_ref.fasta <sample_reads> | samtools sort |
                  samtools coverage -o coverage_summary.tsv

R packages: tidyverse, ggtree, ape, readxl, lubridate, patchwork
-->

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggtree)
library(ape)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)

# Font sizes optimised for A4 printing
# Figure width: 18 in → A4: 8.27 in → scale factor ~0.46 → base 22 pt ≈ 10 pt printed
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 22))
```

## File Paths

```{r file-paths}
# Update these paths to point to your local data files
fp_data    <- "../data/FileS1_to_FileS10.xlsx"
fp_clusters <- "../data/clusters_data_final.csv"
fp_plasmid <- "../data/pNS39_A_alignment_coverage_summary.tsv"
tree_base  <- "../data/st39_cluster"
out_dir    <- "."

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Data Loading

```{r load-metadata}
normalize_id <- function(x) {
  x %>% as.character() %>% str_trim() %>% str_replace_all("[[:space:]]+", "_")
}
strip_suffix <- function(x) {
  x %>% str_remove("_1$") %>% str_remove("_final$")
}

st39_data_raw <- read_excel(fp_data, sheet = "Supp_File2_Study_isolates")

st39_data <- st39_data_raw %>%
  filter(ST == "ST39") %>%
  mutate(sample_id = normalize_id(sample_id)) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    Status1 = case_when(
      Status == "Environmental"              ~ "Environmental",
      Status %in% c("Neonate", "Non-neonate") ~ "Clinical",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    Status2 = case_when(
      Status == "Neonate"      ~ "Neonate",
      Status == "Non-neonate"  ~ "Non-neonate",
      Status == "Environmental" ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )
cat("Loaded", nrow(st39_data), "ST39 samples\n")
```

```{r load-plasmid}
plasmid_data_raw <- read_tsv(fp_plasmid, show_col_types = FALSE)

plasmid_data <- plasmid_data_raw %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id_original = normalize_id(Sample_ID),
    sample_id          = strip_suffix(sample_id_original),
    coverage_category  = case_when(
      `Ref_Coverage_%` >= 95 ~ "Complete (≥95%)",
      `Ref_Coverage_%` >= 50 ~ "Partial (50-95%)",
      `Ref_Coverage_%` >  0  ~ "Fragments (<50%)",
      TRUE ~ "Absent"
    ),
    coverage_category = factor(coverage_category,
                               levels = c("Complete (≥95%)", "Partial (50-95%)",
                                          "Fragments (<50%)", "Absent"))
  ) %>%
  select(sample_id, sample_id_original,
         Ref_Coverage = `Ref_Coverage_%`,
         coverage_category,
         Identity     = `Identity_%`)
```

```{r load-clusters}
clust <- read_csv(fp_clusters, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(ST == "ST39") %>%
  rename(sample_id = id) %>%
  mutate(sample_id = normalize_id(sample_id)) %>%
  select(sample_id, Cluster) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

st39_data <- st39_data %>%
  left_join(clust, by = "sample_id") %>%
  mutate(
    Cluster = case_when(
      Status1 == "Environmental" ~ "ENV",
      is.na(Cluster)             ~ "NC",
      TRUE ~ as.character(Cluster)
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(plasmid_data, by = "sample_id")
```

```{r process-dates}
st39_data <- st39_data %>%
  mutate(
    Collection_date = make_date(year = Year, month = Month, day = Day),
    Week_in_month   = ceiling(Day / 7),
    Month_name      = month.abb[Month],
    Timeline_label  = paste0(Month_name, " Wk", Week_in_month)
  )
```

## Colour Schemes

```{r define-colours}
cluster_cols <- c(
  "1" = "#66c2a5", "2" = "#8da0cb", "3" = "#fc8d62",
  "4" = "#e78ac3", "5" = "#a6d854",
  "ENV" = "#d9d9d9", "NC" = "grey50"
)
class_cols <- c(
  "Aminoglycosides"  = "#7fc97f",
  "Bla ESBL"         = "#fdc086",
  "Phenicol"         = "#ffed6f",
  "Sulfonamide"      = "#386cb0",
  "Tetracycline"     = "#bf5b17",
  "Trimethoprim"     = "#f0027f",
  "Macrolides"       = "#beaed4",
  "Fluoroquinolones" = "#fb8072",
  "Other"            = "#666666"
)
meta_cols <- c(
  "Clinical"      = "#92C2E8",
  "Environmental" = "#b2182b",
  "Neonate"       = "#000000",
  "Non-neonate"   = "#737373",
  "Other"         = "#f7f7f7"
)
plasmid_cols <- c(
  "Complete (≥95%)"  = "#08519c",
  "Partial (50-95%)" = "#6baed6",
  "Fragments (<50%)" = "#c6dbef",
  "Absent"           = "#f7f7f7"
)
```

## Phylogenetic Tree

```{r load-tree}
for (ext in c(".treefile", ".nwk")) {
  tree_file <- paste0(tree_base, ext)
  if (file.exists(tree_file)) break
}
if (!exists("tree_file") || !file.exists(tree_file)) {
  iq <- readLines(paste0(tree_base, ".iqtree"))
  line <- grep("^\\(", iq, value = TRUE)[1]
  tree_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".nwk")
  writeLines(line, tree_file)
}
tr <- read.tree(tree_file)
gt <- ggtree(tr)
cat("Tree:", Ntip(tr), "tips\n")
```

```{r process-tree-data}
tree_y_order <- gt$data %>%
  filter(isTip) %>%
  arrange(desc(y)) %>%
  pull(label) %>%
  normalize_id()

st39_data_in_tree <- st39_data %>%
  filter(sample_id %in% tree_y_order) %>%
  mutate(sample_id = factor(sample_id, levels = rev(tree_y_order)))

cat("Samples in tree:", nrow(st39_data_in_tree), "\n")
cat("Plasmid coverage summary:\n")
print(table(st39_data_in_tree$coverage_category, useNA = "always"))
```

```{r tree-panel}
gt$data <- gt$data %>%
  mutate(label_norm = normalize_id(label)) %>%
  left_join(st39_data_in_tree %>% transmute(label_norm = as.character(sample_id), Cluster),
            by = "label_norm")

p_tree <- gt +
  geom_tippoint(aes(color = Cluster),
                size = 4.5, shape = 21, fill = "white", stroke = 3.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_cols, na.value = "grey80") +
  labs(title = "ST39", tag = "A") +
  guides(color = "none") +
  theme_tree2(base_size = 22) +
  theme(plot.title  = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold"),
        plot.tag    = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
        plot.margin = margin(5.5, 0, 5.5, 5.5))
```

## AMR Heatmap

```{r resistance-heatmap}
res_cols <- c("AGly_acquired","Sul_acquired","Tet_acquired","Bla_ESBL_acquired",
              "MLS_acquired","Tmt_acquired","Phe_acquired","Flq_acquired","Flq_mutations")
res_cols <- res_cols[res_cols %in% names(st39_data_in_tree)]

parse_genes <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || x == "-" || x == "") return(character(0))
  x <- strsplit(x, ";")[[1]]
  x <- gsub("\\*.*|\\^.*|\\.v.*", "", x)
  trimws(x[x != ""])
}
all_genes <- st39_data_in_tree %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(res_cols), ~ifelse(is.na(.x), "", .x))) %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(res_cols)) %>%
  pull(value) %>%
  discard(~is.na(.x) || .x == "" || .x == "-") %>%
  map(parse_genes) %>% unlist() %>% unique() %>% sort()

mat <- matrix(0L, nrow = nrow(st39_data_in_tree), ncol = length(all_genes),
              dimnames = list(as.character(st39_data_in_tree$sample_id), all_genes))
for (i in seq_len(nrow(st39_data_in_tree))) {
  row <- st39_data_in_tree[i, ]
  present <- unique(unlist(lapply(res_cols, function(col) parse_genes(row[[col]]))))
  present <- intersect(present, all_genes)
  if (length(present)) mat[i, present] <- 1L
}

drug_map <- tribble(
  ~class,              ~pattern,
  "Aminoglycosides",   "^aac|^aph|^aad|strA|strB",
  "Bla ESBL",          "^CTX|^SHV|^TEM",
  "Macrolides",        "^mph|^erm|^mef",
  "Sulfonamide",       "^sul",
  "Trimethoprim",      "^dfr",
  "Tetracycline",      "^tet",
  "Phenicol",          "^cat|^cmlA|^floR",
  "Fluoroquinolones",  "^qnr|^aac\\(6'\\)-Ib-cr|^oqx|gyrA|parC|parE"
)
class_of_gene <- function(g) {
  cls <- drug_map$class[str_detect(g, regex(drug_map$pattern, ignore_case = TRUE))]
  if (length(cls) == 0) "Other" else cls[1]
}

res_df_long <- as.data.frame(mat) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  mutate(sample_id = factor(sample_id, levels = levels(st39_data_in_tree$sample_id))) %>%
  pivot_longer(-sample_id, names_to = "gene", values_to = "present") %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id = factor(sample_id, levels = levels(st39_data_in_tree$sample_id)),
    class     = map_chr(gene, class_of_gene),
    class     = factor(class, levels = names(class_cols)),
    present   = if_else(present == 1L, "Present", NA)
  )

p_res <- ggplot(res_df_long, aes(x = gene, y = sample_id, fill = class)) +
  geom_tile(data = subset(res_df_long, !is.na(present))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = class_cols, name = "Drug class", na.value = "white") +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, tag = "B") +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 18),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 19), legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"),
        plot.tag     = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
        panel.grid   = element_blank(), plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 0))
```

## Metadata Panel

```{r metadata-panel}
meta_long <- st39_data_in_tree %>%
  select(sample_id, Status1, Status2) %>%
  mutate(sample_id = factor(sample_id, levels = levels(st39_data_in_tree$sample_id))) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(Status1, Status2), names_to = "field", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(sample_id = factor(sample_id, levels = levels(st39_data_in_tree$sample_id)))

p_meta <- ggplot(meta_long, aes(x = field, y = sample_id, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(Status1 = "Clinical/Env", Status2 = "Patient type")) +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = meta_cols, name = "Metadata", na.value = "white") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, tag = "C") +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 19),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 19), legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"),
        plot.tag     = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
        panel.grid   = element_blank(), plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 0))
```

## Plasmid Coverage Panel

```{r plasmid-panel}
plasmid_long <- st39_data_in_tree %>%
  select(sample_id, coverage_category, Ref_Coverage) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id         = factor(sample_id, levels = levels(st39_data_in_tree$sample_id)),
    coverage_category = if_else(is.na(coverage_category), "Absent", as.character(coverage_category)),
    coverage_category = factor(coverage_category, levels = names(plasmid_cols))
  )

cat("Coverage for visualisation:\n")
print(table(plasmid_long$coverage_category))

p_plasmid <- ggplot(plasmid_long, aes(x = "pNS39_A", y = sample_id, fill = coverage_category)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plasmid_cols, name = "Plasmid\nCoverage",
                    na.value = "#f7f7f7", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, tag = "D") +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 19, face = "italic"),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 19), legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"),
        plot.tag     = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
        panel.grid   = element_blank(), plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 0))
```

## Timeline Panel

```{r timeline-panel}
timeline_order <- st39_data_in_tree %>%
  filter(!is.na(Timeline_label)) %>%
  arrange(Collection_date) %>%
  pull(Timeline_label) %>%
  unique()

p_time <- ggplot(st39_data_in_tree,
                 aes(x = factor(Timeline_label, levels = timeline_order), y = sample_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = Cluster),
             size = 4.5, shape = 21, fill = "white", stroke = 3.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cluster_cols, name = "Cluster") +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(add = 0.6)) +
  labs(x = "Month & Week", y = NULL, tag = "E") +
  theme(axis.text.y   = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.justification = "top",
        legend.text   = element_text(size = 19), legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"),
        axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 17, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.x  = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        plot.tag      = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90"),
        plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 0))
```

## Assemble and Save

```{r assemble, fig.width=18, fig.height=10}
figS3 <- (p_tree + p_res + p_meta + p_plasmid + p_time) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 5, widths = c(1.5, 1.5, 0.6, 0.4, 2), guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.box = "vertical")

figS3
```

```{r save, eval=FALSE}
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "figS3_st39_plasmid.pdf"), figS3, width = 18, height = 10)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "figS3_st39_plasmid.svg"), figS3, width = 18, height = 10)
cat("Saved figS3_st39_plasmid.pdf and .svg\n")
```

## Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
